powerFxFormulas.generateRandomName: With({_firstNames: ["Ana", "Carlos", "Maria", "João", "Lucia", "Pedro", "Fernanda", "Roberto", "Camila", "Rafael"], _lastNames: ["Silva", "Santos", "Oliveira", "Souza", "Rodrigues", "Ferreira", "Alves", "Pereira", "Lima", "Gomes"]}, Index(_firstNames, RandBetween(1, CountRows(_firstNames))).Value & " " & Index(_lastNames, RandBetween(1, CountRows(_lastNames))).Value)
powerFxFormulas.generateRandomEmail: With({_domains: ["gmail.com", "hotmail.com", "yahoo.com.br", "outlook.com", "empresa.com.br"]}, Lower(Substitute(Substitute([Name], " ", "."), "ã", "a")) & RandBetween(100, 999) & "@" & Index(_domains, RandBetween(1, CountRows(_domains))).Value)
powerFxFormulas.generateRandomPhone: With({_areaCodes: ["11", "21", "31", "41", "51", "61", "71", "81", "85", "87"]}, "(" & Index(_areaCodes, RandBetween(1, CountRows(_areaCodes))).Value & ") " & RandBetween(10000, 99999) & "-" & RandBetween(1000, 9999))
